heading: Petersburg National Battlefield boundary modification
label: 423a–3 Petersburg National Battlefield boundary modification
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b)(2) of amended , , which is not classified to the Code.section 2834 of Pub. L. 114–328section 2834 of Pub. L. 114–328section 313(a) of Pub. L. 95–62592 Stat. 3479
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b)(2) of amended , , which is not classified to the Code.section 2834 of Pub. L. 114–328section 2834 of Pub. L. 114–328section 313(a) of Pub. L. 95–62592 Stat. 3479

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The boundary of the Petersburg National Battlefield is modified to include the land and interests in land as generally depicted on the map titled “Petersburg National Battlefield Proposed Boundary Expansion”, numbered 325/80,080, and dated June 2007/March 2016. The map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the National Park Service.

children.heading: Authority
children.label: 1 Authority
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior (referred to in this section as the “Secretary”) is authorized to acquire the land and interests in land described in subsection (a) from willing sellers only, by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds, exchange, or transfer.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: c Administration
children.text: The Secretary shall administer any land or interests in land acquired under subsection (b) as part of the Petersburg National Battlefield in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.

children.label: A
children.text: from the Secretary to the Secretary of the Army administrative jurisdiction over the approximately 1.170-acre parcel of land depicted as “Area to be transferred to Fort Lee Military Reservation” on the map described in paragraph (2); and

children.label: B
children.text: from the Secretary of the Army to the Secretary administrative jurisdiction over the approximately 1.171-acre parcel of land depicted as “Area to be transferred to Petersburg National Battlefield” on the map described in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Map
children.label: 2 Map
children.text: The parcels of land described in paragraph (1) are depicted on the map titled “Petersburg National Battlefield Proposed Transfer of Administrative Jurisdiction”, numbered 325/80,801A, dated May 2011/March 2016. The map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the National Park Service.

children.heading: No reimbursement or consideration
children.label: A No reimbursement or consideration
children.text: The transfer shall be without reimbursement or consideration.

children.heading: Land transferred to the Secretary of the Army
children.label: i Land transferred to the Secretary of the Army
children.text: The land transferred to the Secretary of the Army under paragraph (1)(A) shall be excluded from the boundary of the Petersburg National Battlefield.

children.heading: Land transferred to the Secretary
children.label: ii Land transferred to the Secretary
I
children.text: shall be included within the boundary of the Petersburg National Battlefield; and

children.label: II
children.text: shall be administered as part of Petersburg National Battlefield in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.
